overall.description: First-person view from inside a futuristic train traveling through a neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The camera shows the interior of a sleek train car with rows of seats and overhead displays, while outside the windows, towering buildings with bright holographic advertisements and neon signs pass by. This is high-quality game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring the train journey through Night City.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a sleek futuristic train car with rows of empty seats and overhead LED lighting. Through the windows, the train moves through a dense urban canyon of towering buildings covered in bright neon advertisements and holographic displays, characteristic of a cyberpunk city at night.

events.description: train enters dark enclosed tunnel section with close concrete walls
bright light appears ahead as train approaches tunnel exit

agents.ego_description: continuing through the train journey as outside view transitions from neon city to dark tunnel

segments.scene_description: The train enters a dark enclosed tunnel section where the bright neon cityscape gives way to close concrete walls and dim artificial lighting. The destination display remains visible at the front of the car as the train moves steadily through the tunnel, approaching a bright exit at the far end.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated train track with expansive city views

events.description: train exits tunnel onto elevated track with open city views
passing large holographic billboards and high-rise glass towers

agents.ego_description: traveling on elevated tracks with panoramic views of the futuristic city skyline

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel, the train travels on elevated tracks with expansive views of the cyberpunk cityscape. Massive high-rise buildings with glowing windows and holographic advertisements line both sides of the track. The destination display changes from 'WESTBROOK' to 'NORTH OAK' as the train continues through the open urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: train approaching terminal station with platform structures

events.description: train enters station approach with platform structures becoming visible
train begins to slow down as it approaches the station platform

agents.ego_description: approaching the final destination as the train decelerates and station infrastructure becomes prominent

illuminated platform area with safety barriers visible through windows

segments.scene_description: The train enters the final approach to the station, with platform structures and terminal buildings becoming visible through the windows. The train begins to slow down as it nears the destination, passing covered walkways and illuminated platform areas. The interior remains consistent with the digital display showing the destination as the journey concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from inside a futuristic train as it travels from a dense neon urban canyon through a dark tunnel and out into an expansive cityscape. It begins within a sleek car featuring empty seats and overhead LED lighting, gliding past towering buildings adorned with holographic advertisements. As the train enters a dark enclosed tunnel, the vibrant city lights vanish, replaced by dim artificial lighting and close concrete walls before the camera tracks toward a bright exit. The scene then opens onto elevated tracks with wide views of glowing high-rises, while the interior destination display shifts from Westbrook to North Oak. Finally, the train slows as it approaches the station, passing illuminated platform structures and covered walkways as the journey concludes.
